title: Character Set Used
text: Character Set Used The character set to be used for this C component. Valid values are System Character Set (default), Default Character Set , UTF-8 , UTF-16 , or UTF-32 . Applies To Signature Implementation (C) Related Links $SYS_CHARSET Specify the character set used for communication with the operating system and for communication between Uniface and non-Uniface components, if they are not Unicode-based.
